entries.title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI

entries.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
entries.description: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.
